data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Spotify employs a microservices architecture to manage different features and services independently.
data.technical_spec: Decomposed applications for independent scalability, developed using various programming languages and frameworks.

data.title: Scalable Infrastructure
data.description: Designed to handle millions of concurrent users streaming music globally.
data.technical_spec: Hosted on cloud platforms like Google Cloud for scalability and reliability.

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.description: Utilizes an event-driven architecture for real-time data streaming and processing.
data.technical_spec: Employs tools like Kafka for seamless data flow and processing.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Mediates API traffic to manage requests effectively and securely.
data.technical_spec: Using API gateway solutions for rate limiting and access control.

data.title: Data Pipeline
data.description: Handles vast amounts of data through robust data pipelines.
data.technical_spec: Combines batch and stream processing using tools like Hadoop and Spark.
